notes: Identifier replacements corrupted method calls and declarations, e.g. md.update became mdmaterialpdate and assignments lost equals signs.
The substitutions rename both a String local and a URL local to file in the same scope.
Inserted string literals contain raw newlines, which are not valid Java string literals.
Identifier replacement corrupted expressions and loop syntax.
CODA inserts unindented assignments into a Python function body and introduces undefined names such as tab7, aT, and rT.
